name: Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, combine the first four ingredients. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 minute.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients: baking powder, baking soda, white flour, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves.
4. Make a well in the center of the sifted ingredients and fold in the boiled mixture.
5. Mix well until combined.
6. Bake at 300°F for 60 minutes.
7. Test to ensure it is done all the way through by inserting a toothpick into the center; if it comes out clean, it's ready.
8. If not done, return to the oven for a few more minutes and test again.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
